title: perebea mollis subsp. mollis
intro: Perebea mollis subsp. mollis, also known as the smooth Perebea, is a plant species in the family Chrysobalanaceae. It is a climbing shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Perebea mollis subsp. mollis is often used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and it is also used as an antiseptic to prevent infections and promote wound healing.
